## Review checklist

- [ ] Scope is small and matches the linked issue.
- [ ] No unrelated feature expansion is included.
- [ ] Regression coverage was added or an existing test covers the change.
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` or docs were updated if user-visible behavior changed.
- [ ] Gitlink sync is planned after merge.
